title: Billing Settings
subtitle: Configure default billing settings for students

paymentDueDays.label: Default Due Date (in days)
paymentDueDays.description: How many days after invoice creation it should be due. Applied to all new invoices.

chargeTiming.title: Billing Model
chargeTiming.description: Define when classes will be charged to your students.
chargeTiming.prepaidDescription: The invoice is generated immediately when scheduling the class. Paid classes cannot be recurring. In case of cancellation, there is no automatic refund.
chargeTiming.postpaidDescription: Classes are accumulated and charged on the billing cycle closing date. Classes can be recurring. In case of late cancellation, a fee may be applied according to your policy.
chargeTiming.infoContent: The billing model defines when the invoice is generated for paid individual classes. Free or makeup classes are not affected. Monthly subscriptions continue to be charged on the normal cycle regardless of the chosen model.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.description: Select the payment methods your students can use. Methods will be applied in priority order: Boleto → PIX → Card.
paymentMethods.cardDescription: Accept payments via credit or debit card
paymentMethods.pixDescription: Automatically generates PIX QR Code (minimum R$ 1.00)
paymentMethods.noMethodsWarning: Select at least one payment method to charge your students.
paymentMethods.noMethodsError: You must have at least one payment method enabled.

autoGenerateBoleto.title: Automatic boleto generation
autoGenerateBoleto.description: When disabled, invoices will be created normally but without generating a boleto on Stripe. Useful for teachers who generate boletos directly at their bank.
autoGenerateBoleto.disabled: Boletos will not be generated automatically

messages.updateSuccessDescription: Your billing settings have been saved successfully.
